movies.title: Amélie
movies.synopsis: Amélie, a young waitress in a Montmartre café, spends her days observing people and letting her imagination wander. She has set herself a mission: to do good in the lives of those around her. She devises clever schemes to secretly intervene in their daily existence. Along her journey, she encounters a series of colorful characters: Georgette, the hypochondriac tobacconist; Lucien, the gentle grocery assistant; Madeleine Wallace, the port-loving concierge surrounded by stuffed animals; and Raymond Dufayel, the 'glass man' who lives through a Renoir painting. This quest for happiness eventually leads Amélie to Nino Quincampoix, a peculiar and charming young man who divides his time between a ghost train and a sex shop, while searching for the identity of a mysterious man whose photo keeps reappearing in photo booths.

movies.title: 28 days later
movies.synopsis: A group of animal rights activists break into a secret laboratory to free chimpanzees subjected to horrific experiments. But once released, the primates—infected with a mysterious virus and driven by uncontrollable rage—violently attack their rescuers. Twenty-eight days later, the infection has spread rapidly across the country, the population has been evacuated, and London has become a ghost city. The few survivors hide from the infected, who are consumed by violence. It is in this desolate world that Jim, a bicycle courier, awakens from a deep coma...

movies.title: Babel
movies.synopsis: In the Moroccan desert, a single gunshot sets off a chain of events that intertwines the lives of several people: an American couple on the brink of collapse, two young Moroccan boys responsible for an accidental crime, a nanny traveling illegally with two American children, and a rebellious Japanese teenager whose father is wanted by the police in Tokyo. Separated by culture and geography, these individuals share a common fate marked by isolation, misunderstanding, and pain.

movies.title: Barry Lyndon
movies.synopsis: In 18th-century Ireland, young Redmond Barry seeks to rise above his modest origins after his father's death. After killing his rival, a British officer courting his cousin, in a duel, he is forced into exile. He joins the British army and fights across Europe, but soon deserts and is compelled to serve in the Prussian army under Frederick the Great to avoid execution. Tasked with spying on a noble gambler, Barry becomes entangled in deception and eventually earns the protection of the very man he was sent to observe. Introduced into high society, he becomes the lover of the wealthy Lady Lyndon. When her husband discovers the affair, he falls into despair and dies. Barry marries Lady Lyndon and ascends into aristocracy.

movies.title: 2001: A space Odyssey
movies.synopsis: At the dawn of humanity, in the African desert, a tribe of primates struggles against a rival group for control of a water source. The appearance of a mysterious black monolith inspires a breakthrough: one of them discovers the use of a bone as a weapon, marking the birth of the first tool. Four million years later, in 2001, a spacecraft orbits the Moon as Dr. Heywood Floyd investigates another monolith emitting signals toward Jupiter. Eighteen months later, astronauts David Bowman and Frank Poole journey to Jupiter aboard the Discovery, assisted by HAL 9000, an advanced and seemingly sentient computer. As HAL begins to behave unpredictably, questions arise about the true purpose of the mission and what awaits them at their destination.

movies.title: Dark City
movies.synopsis: John Murdoch awakens in a hotel room with no memory of who he is, only to discover he is wanted for a series of brutal murders. Hunted by Inspector Bumstead, he sets out to uncover the truth about his identity. His search leads him into a dark and surreal labyrinth populated by mysterious beings with terrifying powers. With the help of Dr. Schreber, Murdoch begins to piece together fragments of his troubled past.

movies.title: Christine
movies.synopsis: Arnie Cunningham, a shy and awkward teenager, becomes obsessed with a mysterious 1958 Plymouth Fury named Christine. As he restores the car, his personality begins to change, growing darker and more aggressive. Christine, seemingly possessed by a malevolent force, develops a will of her own and eliminates anyone who threatens Arnie. Their bond becomes increasingly dangerous, blurring the line between obsession and control.

movies.title: The Fifth Element
movies.synopsis: In the 23rd century, in a vibrant and futuristic world, humanity's survival depends on the discovery of a mysterious fifth element. When an ancient evil returns, a reluctant hero must join forces with a mysterious young woman to unlock the key to saving mankind.

movies.title: Get out
movies.synopsis: Chris and his girlfriend Rose seem to have the perfect relationship. The time has come for Chris to meet her parents during a weekend at their secluded estate. At first, he attributes the family's strange behavior to nervousness about their interracial relationship. But as unsettling incidents begin to escalate, Chris uncovers a horrifying truth far beyond anything he could have imagined.

movies.title: Mars attacks!
movies.synopsis: Excitement spreads across Earth as Martians finally decide to pay a visit. Their gleaming flying saucers descend upon a thrilled America, sparking both fascination and chaos. What begins as a moment of wonder quickly turns into a wildly unpredictable and destructive encounter, in this nostalgic and satirical take on 1950s science fiction.

movies.title: It follows
movies.synopsis: In a quiet suburb of Detroit, Jay, a carefree college student in her early twenties, goes to the movies with Hugh, a boy she has recently started seeing. But he suddenly panics and cuts the evening short after spotting something unsettling. During a second date by a lake, the two sleep together for the first time. Afterwards, Hugh chloroforms Jay. When she wakes up, she finds herself tied to a wheelchair. A terrified Hugh explains that something—taking various forms, familiar or not—is now following her with the intent to kill. If it succeeds, the curse will pass back to the person who gave it to her. To escape it, Jay has only one option: pass it on to someone else by sleeping with them.

movies.title: M
movies.synopsis: The press is consumed by the same terrifying story: a child murderer has struck again, spreading fear throughout the city. Inspector Lohmann intensifies police raids across the underworld in an effort to catch him. Frustrated by the disruption, the criminal underworld decides to take matters into its own hands, enlisting beggars and vagrants to watch every street corner and track down the killer themselves.

movies.title: The fly
movies.synopsis: Seth Brundle, a brilliant but eccentric scientist, decides to work independently after leaving a prestigious research team. He develops a revolutionary invention: teleportation, the ability to transport matter through space. After unsuccessful experiments on a baboon and mounting pressure following media leaks, he decides to test the machine on himself. Unbeknownst to him, a fly enters the device with him, leading to horrifying and irreversible consequences.

movies.title: The Lives of Others
movies.synopsis: In early 1980s East Germany, successful playwright Georg Dreyman and his partner, actress Christa-Maria Sieland, are considered part of the cultural elite, even though they secretly question the regime. When the Ministry of Culture takes an interest in Christa, a Stasi officer named Wiesler is assigned to monitor them. As he listens in on their lives, Wiesler becomes increasingly fascinated by the couple, leading him to question his own beliefs and loyalties.

movies.title: Logan's run
movies.synopsis: In a futuristic society set in the year 2274, citizens live lives of pleasure but are required to die at the age of 30 to prevent overpopulation. Logan 5, a law enforcement officer tasked with tracking down those who attempt to escape their fate, begins to question the system. Alongside Jessica 6, he rebels and goes on the run in search of a way out.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
movies.synopsis: In this first chapter of the trilogy, the young and timid hobbit Frodo Baggins inherits a ring that turns out to be the One Ring, a powerful artifact that would allow the Dark Lord Sauron to rule Middle-earth. To prevent this, Frodo must journey across the land to Mount Doom, where the Ring was forged, and destroy it. He is joined by a fellowship of hobbits, men, a wizard, a dwarf, and an elf. Together, they face not only the external threat of Sauron's forces, but also internal tensions and the corrupting influence of the Ring itself.

movies.title: The Addams Family
movies.synopsis: Living a peaceful yet delightfully macabre life in their haunted mansion, Gomez, Morticia, and their children Wednesday and Pugsley see their world turned upside down when a man claiming to be Uncle Fester—missing for 25 years—appears at their doorstep. But could he be an impostor with plans to steal the family's hidden fortune?

movies.title: Rosemary's Baby
movies.synopsis: Against the advice of their friend Hutch, Guy Woodhouse and his pregnant wife Rosemary move into an aging New York apartment building rumored to have a sinister past. Their overly friendly neighbors, Minnie and Roman Castevet, quickly insert themselves into their lives. While Guy welcomes their presence, Rosemary grows increasingly uneasy as strange and disturbing events begin to unfold.

movies.title: Children of Men
movies.synopsis: In a dystopian future where humans can no longer reproduce, the death of the youngest person on Earth—only 18 years old—throws society into despair. Suddenly, a woman becomes mysteriously pregnant, the first such case in nearly two decades. As the most valuable and sought-after person on the planet, she must be protected at all costs, and a disillusioned man is tasked with ensuring her safety.

movies.title: Dangerous Liaisons
movies.synopsis: Two cunning and sophisticated aristocrats, the Marquise de Merteuil and the charming Vicomte de Valmont, form a pact after ending their affair. As part of their manipulative games, Merteuil challenges Valmont to seduce the innocent Cécile de Volanges, who is soon to marry one of her former lovers. Meanwhile, Valmont undertakes the far more difficult task of seducing the virtuous Madame de Tourvel, setting in motion a dangerous web of deception, desire, and betrayal.

movies.title: Looper
movies.synopsis: In the near future, the Mafia has developed a foolproof system to eliminate unwanted witnesses. They send their targets back in time to the present day, where specialized hitmen known as Loopers dispose of them. One day, Joe, one of these assassins, discovers that his next target is none other than himself—20 years older. The perfectly organized system begins to break down.

movies.title: Midsommar
movies.synopsis: Dani and Christian are on the verge of breaking up when a tragic event devastates Dani's family. Out of guilt, Christian invites her to join him and his friends on a trip to a remote Swedish village for a midsummer festival that occurs only once every 90 years. What begins as an idyllic getaway under the endless daylight soon turns into something deeply disturbing and sinister.

movies.title: Millenium
movies.synopsis: Mikael Blomkvist, a financial journalist for Millennium magazine, is convicted of libel and decides to step away from his career. He is then hired by industrialist Henrik Vanger to investigate the decades-old disappearance of his niece, Harriet. As Blomkvist delves deeper, he uncovers dark secrets within the powerful Vanger family. During his investigation, he crosses paths with Lisbeth Salander, a brilliant and unconventional hacker with an extraordinary talent for uncovering hidden information. Together, they unravel a case far more complex than either of them expected.

movies.title: Minority report
movies.synopsis: In Washington, D.C., in 2054, society has eliminated murder thanks to an advanced system called PreCrime. Hidden within the Department of Justice, three psychics known as Precogs foresee future crimes, allowing Chief John Anderton to arrest perpetrators before they act. But when the system predicts that Anderton himself will commit a murder within 36 hours, he becomes a fugitive. To prove his innocence, he must uncover the truth behind the prediction, relying on fragmented and mysterious visions from Agatha, the most gifted of the Precogs.

movies.title: Volver
movies.synopsis: Set in Madrid and its vibrant working-class neighborhoods, the film follows three generations of women navigating life, love, and loss. Bound by family ties and shared resilience, they endure hardship, secrets, and even death itself with humor, courage, and an unbreakable spirit.

movies.title: Music box
movies.synopsis: Ann Talbot, a successful Chicago lawyer, is called upon to defend her father, who is accused of war crimes. Michael Laszlo fled Hungary after World War II and has lived peacefully in the United States for decades. When overwhelming evidence and witnesses emerge identifying him as a former Nazi torturer, Ann is determined to prove his innocence. However, as she investigates further, the case becomes far more complex and unsettling than she ever imagined.

movies.title: The Searchers
movies.synopsis: Texas, 1868. After a Comanche raid destroys his brother's family and kidnaps his two nieces, Ethan Edwards sets out on a relentless quest to find them. Accompanied by a small group, he embarks on a long and dangerous journey driven by vengeance, obsession, and a complex sense of justice.

movies.title: Groundhog Day
movies.synopsis: Phil Connors, a cynical TV weatherman, travels to Punxsutawney to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities. After being forced to stay overnight due to a snowstorm, he wakes up to find himself reliving the same day—February 2nd—over and over again. Trapped in this time loop, Phil must confront himself and find a way to change.

movies.title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
movies.synopsis: Jack Skellington, the Pumpkin King of Halloween Town, has grown tired of celebrating the same holiday year after year and longs for something new. When he discovers Christmas Town, he becomes fascinated and decides to take over Christmas himself, with unexpected and chaotic consequences.

movies.title: Metropolis
movies.synopsis: In a futuristic city of the year 2026, wealthy elites live in luxury above ground while workers toil in harsh conditions underground to sustain the system. Tensions rise as an android manipulates the workers into rebellion, threatening to plunge the entire society into chaos.
